transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang
Yupdduk (brand) came out with this new Black Bean Flavor
I got it half & half with the original
I'll eat them individually at first and mix them together after
Here I have 9 Myungrang Hot Dogs (Corn Dogs)
I ordered 10, but I received 9
But that's what I have Bon appetit
Wait, that's too much
Hot!
Let's try their new flavor
I wasn't expecting much, but it's not bad
Maybe it's just this location?
It's good
It has a kick to it
The sauce isn't too overpowering I can still taste the original spicy rice cake taste

It's good
It has a kick to it for sure
Also a salty flavor
Original
The original tastes for sure
Potato corn dog
Was this the whole-mozzarella?
It's empty inside
It's really tasty
The cheese is hardened, but it's still good
Dip it in the sauce
I can taste the blackbean sauce, but it's just a salty flavor
The cheese is hardened
Blackbean rice cake and cheese
It's not bad
I lowkey don't want to mix it together

Which one is this?
I brought the air fryer because they got cold
It's good
It's better heated up
It's oozing out There's a sausage on the bottom
What are you?
This one's the mozzarella cheddar
The new flavor doesn't seem too bad
It's edible
Just that much
Doesn't it look appetizing?
2 sausages stuck together
It's not spicy, but it's salty
Let's eat some spicy rice cake first
I wonder which one this is
I ordered a lot of flavors

Most of them are cheese
Filled with cheese
I think the cheddar corn dog is the best
I was going to mix it up by now, but it seems like a waste
I'm going to eat some more Like half
By the looks of it, it has to be the whole-mozzarella
I was correct, but it's not melted all the way
How did I get it right?
Whole-Mozzarella, right?
No, you can't do half & half
This one is either the smoked sausage or the jumbo
Wait, it's the smoked sausage
People are saying I read the stick You know what this says?
They all have the same thing
It says "Spicy Fishcake"
Seriously. "Spicy Fishcake" Wanna see?

You can't see it
Yum
I should mix it up now
After 1 more bite
When the ratio is similar
Idk which one's which
Let's heat it up
Let's take the divider out
I'm scared
Take it out
We eat noodles similar to this too
It's like the same thing
Will this be okay?
The color isn't too great
but it still looks fine, right?
Guys,

This is..
Really strange
The second bite wasn't that bad
It's not bad
This one has rice cake inside
The color looks like curry
The sauce isn't bad
It's good
The cheese hardened already
This is exactly why I prefer watered-down cheese
Those won't get hardened too fast And they will mix in with the sauce
[Chat: Your face is as small as a fist] Not really. More like a watermelon
This is cheddar cheese
Regular cheddar cheese
The ink one doesn't taste too good
The dough is too thick

It broke
The sausage is the best
I was saving this for last
This one's the original
Spicy!
I finished it
Thanks everyone~
